story: I'm a dedicated full stack developer and UI/UX designer with a passion for creating modern, responsive web applications. My journey into web development started with curiosity about how websites work, and has grown into a full-fledged career building digital experiences from the ground up.
journey: From my first HTML page to building complete full-stack applications, I've continuously expanded my skills across frontend and backend technologies. I specialize in turning design concepts into functional, performant web applications that deliver great user experiences.
mission: To build clean, accessible, and performant web applications that solve real problems and delight users.
objectives: Build responsive and accessible web applications
Continuously learn and adopt new technologies
Collaborate with other developers and designers
